plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: MCP server and 12 skills for product analysis, specification writing, strategy, narrative, and stakeholder alignment. Composes with microsoft/azure-skills via `composes_with:` frontmatter for cross-package routing.

plugins.name: azure
plugins.description: Microsoft Azure MCP Server and skills for cloud resource management, deployments, and Azure services. Manage Azure infrastructure, monitor applications, and deploy resources directly from Copilot.

plugins.name: agent-council
plugins.description: Multi-agent quality gate for tier-1 text artifacts. 5 role-conditioned LLM deliberators (Skeptic, Voice & Identity, Evidence & Calibration, Strategy & Stakes, Adjudicator) run a 2-round async + cross-read protocol and return SHIP / REVISE / HOLD plus a revision brief and full audit transcript. Bundled MCP server + slash commands. 4 runtime adapters (claude_cli, lmstudio, ollama, mock_cli). Use to gate external publishes, identity-shaping docs, and memory writes.
